title_descriptor: Fabric for Safety Jackets Non Neon Colors
page_title: Fabric for Safety Jackets Non Neon Colors - ArNeo Color - Ariteks
description_blocks: ArNeo Color is a 100% polyester, 120 g/m² warp knitted fabric.
It used for jackets with reflective stips.
As its is a jacket with non neon color it has mostly corporate usage than security applications.

ArNeo Color is a 100% polyester, 120 g/m² warp knitted fabric. It used for jackets with reflective stips. As its is a jacket with non neon color it has mostly corporate usage than security applications.
